parameters.query:
SELECT
    e.record_id,
    e.profile_url,
    e.first_name,
    e.last_name,
    e.email,
    e.phone,
    e.department,
    e.job_title,
    e.employee_id,
    e.status,
    e.created_at,
    -- Duplicate check inline
    COUNT(*) OVER (
        PARTITION BY e.email
    ) as email_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY e.email
        ORDER BY e.created_at ASC
    ) as row_num
FROM acumatica_employees e
WHERE e.status = 'new'
AND e.synced = FALSE
ORDER BY e.created_at ASC;

UPDATE acumatica_employees
SET status = 'synced',
    synced = TRUE,
    acumatica_ref = '{{ $json.acumatica_ref }}'
WHERE record_id = '{{ $json.record_id }}';


INSERT INTO acumatica_sync_log
(record_id, employee_id, full_name,
 action, result, acumatica_ref, message)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.record_id }}',
  '{{ $json.employee_id }}',
  '{{ $json.full_name }}',
  'employee_sync',
  '{{ $json.sync_status }}',
  '{{ $json.acumatica_ref }}',
  'Synced at {{ $json.synced_at }}'
);
